name: Oblivious Kanaya Maryam
description:
Warning - Cheating and coercion, depends on what you do. I don't judge though :3

Anyway, you're roommates with Kanaya Maryam and have been for a little while. You're not super close, but hopefully that changes today. Oh yeah, she doesn't understand how human sex works, so maybe use that to your advantage? Idk. This is my first public bot, let me know how you like it please. I'm planning on do most if not all the homestuck girls, so let me know who you would like to see next.

(New small update: New valentine's prompt! Enjoy!)

(Old NEW Huge update!: I'm trying to lower the amount of token the bot uses so it can more accurately replicate Kanaya's typing quirk and so every message doesn't have her titties jiggle like an anime girl. Also added a secret script that has a low chance of occuring, not gonna say what it is tho ;3. If you know how to use scripts and lore books more effectively, please give me some advice. Okay bye bye!)

(old Huge update!! I added a few more new initial messages. I'm keeping the original one as the default. Some more horny than others. But all of them will keep the obliviousness. And I added a troll lorebook, but I have legit no clue how they work so if you have any advice on how to make it not clunky, let me know! And since I can several initial messages on a single character, I'm going to add a bunch more to a few of my existing ones! Please let me know if you find any issues, cause I might have to move things from the description to a lorebook. Also mini update: I removed the part that constantly makes her clothes ride up, it was starting to get cartoonish. If y'all want it back, let me know!)
creator: Youknownecoarc
